articles.title: One injured in South End shooting
articles.description:
Police still have not made any arrests in connection with the incident.

The post One injured in South End shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: One person injured in a shooting in the South End neighborhood.
Police have not made any arrests related to the March 16 incident.
Residents are concerned about safety following the ongoing violence.

articles.title: Red Sox’ Roman Anthony is emerging as a superstar at World Baseball Classic
articles.description:
"Whether it’s Joe DiMaggio or Ted Williams or Derek Jeter or Big Papi, there are some people that just have the ‘It Factor.'"

The post Red Sox’ Roman Anthony is emerging as a superstar at World Baseball Classic appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Roman Anthony showcases talent at the World Baseball Classic, drawing comparisons to legends.
The 20-year-old Red Sox prospect is gaining national attention for his performance.
Boston fans may see Anthony as a future star, enhancing local team pride.

articles.title: 5 Boston sports moments that just missed out on the Soundbites Bracket
articles.description:
Here's a look back at a few soundbites that were almost too good to pass up.

summary: Highlighting five Boston sports moments that were excluded from the Soundbites Bracket.
Moments include iconic plays from the Red Sox and Celtics, showcasing local sports history.
These exclusions spark discussions among Boston fans about memorable sports highlights.
